Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class SearchSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.SearchSettings
public class SearchSettings extends Metadata

Java class for SearchSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="SearchSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="documentContentSearchEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="enableAdvancedSearchInAlohaSidebar" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEinsteinSearchAssistantDialog" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEinsteinSearchEs4kPilot" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEinsteinSearchNLSFilters" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEinsteinSearchNaturalLanguage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEinsteinSearchPersonalization" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEinsteinSearchQA" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePersonalTagging" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePublicTagging" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableQuerySuggestionPigOn" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSalesforceGeneratedSynonyms" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSearchTermHistory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSetupSearch" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSuggestArticlesLinksOnly" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableUseDefaultSearchEntity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="optimizeSearchForCJKEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="recentlyViewedUsersForBlankLookupEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="searchSettingsByObject" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SearchSettingsByObject"/>
         <element name="sidebarAutoCompleteEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="sidebarDropDownListEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="sidebarLimitToItemsIOwnCheckboxEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="singleSearchResultShortcutEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="spellCorrectKnowledgeSearchEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
